meaning: vi.<美口>紧张不安,战战兢兢
examples: More important even than latency is jitter.
Manage delay and variations in delay (jitter).
With latency and jitter, you pay more when you want less.
Moving in and out of turbo mode, however, creates jitter, something that traders want to avoid.
This thing even has a JitterSimulator, so you can, you know, make sure Jitter is being eliminated.
